Forecast ⚡ Live · Salesforce
Blended from three models with dynamic weights by context: current month weights pace 60% / stage-gate 25% / YoY 15%; future months weight stage-gate 55% / YoY 30% / pace 15%. Stage rates recalibrated from Q1 2026 back-test. Pipeline ACV push-discounted (3–5 pushes: −35%; 6+ pushes: −75%). YoY anchored to Q1 2026 actual vs Q1 2025.

Opportunity Score — AI Win Probability Model (1–100)
Live from Salesforce · Updated
How Scores Are Calculated — trained on 677 Closed Won + 2,998 Closed Lost deals (Jan 2025–Apr 2026)
Scores combine 8 statistically derived signals. The strongest finding: deals with a completed trial close at 73% vs 15% without — a 4.9× lift. Multi-year deals (2yr+) close at 95% vs 35% for 1-year deals once they reach negotiation. Score changes over time reflect stage movement, activity engagement, close date slippage, and next step quality.
30
Trial completed
Strongest signal — 4.9× win rate lift. 73% vs 15% without trial.
20
Contract length
2yr+ deals close at 95%. 1yr deals at 35% once at negotiation stage.
15
Stage momentum
Finalizing > Proposal > Trial > Demo. Decays if stale 45+ days.
10
Email activity
8+ logged activities correlates strongly with higher win rates.
8
Lead source
Email/Champify (67%) outperform List (40%). 1.7× conversion difference.
7
Rep track record
Eric Swedler (80%) to Lauren Barbour (25%). Team & rep calibrated.
5
Next step quality
Signing/legal language = 5pts. Empty next step = 0pts (risk signal).
−5
Push count penalty
6+ close date pushes = −5pts. Moderate pushes (1–2) have no penalty.

AE Pacing — YTD (Jan–)
YTD quota = monthly quota × months active through . Adj. remaining = annual quota minus YTD ACV closed.
AE Pods — YTD (Jan–)
Pod rollups combine both AEs' YTD ACV and quotas. Meadow AEs are not podded and aren't listed here.
SDR Pacing — YTD (Jan–)
SDRs credited via Opportunity.Originator on closed-won new business opps (Average Contract Value). YTD quota = monthly quota × months active through . Adj. remaining = annual quota minus YTD ACV closed.
